hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'BuddyPatcher\|patch-buddy.py'; then echo '⚠️ BYTE-LENGTH INVARIANT: Every binary patch MUST produce output identical in byte length to the original. Use .atomic on all Data.write() calls. Add input validation in Validation.swift for new arguments. Run scripts/test-security.sh to verify.'; fi
